_publications._publicationTitle: A multicenter study of neurofibromatosis type 1 utilizing deep learning for whole body tumor identification.

_contextSnippet: During the training process, the IoU increased from 0.22 (epoch = 0) to 0.79 (epoch = 100), while the Dice scores exhibited a similar trend. After 33,000 training iterations, the model demonstrated satisfactory segmentation performance
details: IoU increased from 0.22 (epoch = 0) to 0.79 (epoch = 100), Dice scores exhibited similar trend, achieved accurate segmentation of PNF/MPNST lesions after 33,000 training iterations
